title: No Title
summary: REI Cooperative Action Fund is a community-driven nonprofit that gives grants to nonprofits making the outdoors more accessible and inclusive.
llm_eligibility: None specified, but the grantmaking approach appears to be focused on supporting nonprofits that create a more accessible and inclusive outdoors.
eligibility_signals: nonprofit; 501(c)(3); organization; eligible; must be; requirements
